sentence_reviews.text: Data curation collects, filters, balances, labels, documents, and governs examples so the training distribution better matches intended capabilities and risks.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, data/generalization and dataset methodology context; PML data/preprocessing topics; AIMA developing ML systems, data collection/assessment/management.
sentence_reviews.notes: Collection, filtering/preprocessing, labels, and data management are supported. Documentation/governance, intended capabilities, and risks are broader governance claims not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Data collection, curation & filtering is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval to downstream capabilities including Deduplication, contamination control & provenance, Large-scale pretraining, Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA developing ML systems data collection/assessment/management; PML data/preprocessing and validation topics; Deep Learning dataset and training methodology context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dataset and data-management dependencies are supported. Deduplication, contamination control, provenance, large-scale pretraining, and data-mixture schedules are not directly supported by the cited packet evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Deduplication, contamination control & provenance
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA data collection/assessment/management; PML data and preprocessing topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data management supports the broad connection, but deduplication, contamination control, and provenance are not directly named in the inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, dataset and training methodology context.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected packet source does not directly support large-scale pretraining as a downstream capability of curation.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML data, sampling, and training-methodology topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data and sampling support the general prerequisite, but curricula and data mixtures/schedules are not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML data/preprocessing and validation topics; AIMA data collection/assessment/management; Deep Learning methodology and hyperparameter context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data quality and hyperparameters are supported; compute budget, random variation, evaluation contamination, and databases/IR as direct dependencies are only partly supported.

sentence_reviews.text: Data collection, curation & filtering uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML data, preprocessing, validation, and cross-validation topics; AIMA data collection/assessment/management.
sentence_reviews.notes: Curation directly concerns datasets and sampled examples; wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Data collection, curation & filtering uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA developing ML systems data collection/assessment/management and information retrieval/search-related topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Data management is supported, but databases and information retrieval are not established as core conceptual ingredients for all data curation.

sentence_reviews.text: Data collection, curation & filtering uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML statistics, data, sampling distributions, validation, and cross-validation topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Sampling, balancing, validation, and dataset assessment make statistics relevant; experimental design is only implicit.

edge_reviews.notes: Data curation operates over datasets and sampled examples; core strength is defensible.
Data management supports the relation, but databases/IR as a core dependency is stronger than the evidence.
Dataset assessment, sampling, validation, and balancing make statistics a defensible common dependency.
